title: Provider Directory Entry
description: Healthcare provider profile from an insurance network directory or physician finder.

npi.description: National Provider Identifier (NPI). Commonly found in: NPI registry, provider directory.

provider_type.description: Type of healthcare provider. Commonly found in: provider directory, NPI registry.

first_name.description: Provider's first name. Commonly found in: provider directory, profile page.

last_name.description: Provider's last name. Commonly found in: provider directory, profile page.

credentials.description: Professional credentials (e.g., MD, DO, PhD). Commonly found in: provider directory, profile page.

specialty_primary.description: Primary medical specialty. Commonly found in: provider directory, NPI registry.

specialty_secondary.description: Secondary specialties or subspecialties. Commonly found in: provider directory, profile page.

gender.description: Provider's gender. Commonly found in: provider directory, profile page.

languages.description: Languages spoken by the provider. Commonly found in: provider directory, profile page.

accepting_new_patients.description: Whether the provider is accepting new patients. Commonly found in: provider directory, appointment booking.

telehealth_available.description: Whether telehealth appointments are available. Commonly found in: provider directory, profile page.

accepting_medicaid.description: Whether the provider accepts Medicaid. Commonly found in: provider directory, insurance info.

accepting_medicare.description: Whether the provider accepts Medicare. Commonly found in: provider directory, insurance info.

group_practice_name.description: Name of the group practice or medical group. Commonly found in: provider directory, profile page.

hospital_affiliations.description: Hospitals where the provider has admitting privileges. Commonly found in: provider directory, hospital website.

address_street.description: Street address of the practice. Commonly found in: provider directory, Google Maps.

address_city.description: City of the practice. Commonly found in: provider directory, Google Maps.

address_state.description: State of the practice. Commonly found in: provider directory, NPI registry.

address_zip.description: ZIP code of the practice. Commonly found in: provider directory, NPI registry.

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate of the practice. Commonly found in: geocoding API, Google Maps.

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate of the practice. Commonly found in: geocoding API, Google Maps.

phone.description: Practice phone number. Commonly found in: provider directory, profile page.

website.description: Practice website URL. Commonly found in: provider directory, profile page.

insurances_accepted.description: Insurance plans accepted. Commonly found in: provider directory, insurance section.

review_rating.description: Average patient review rating. Commonly found in: Healthgrades, Zocdoc, review platform.

review_count.description: Total number of patient reviews. Commonly found in: Healthgrades, Zocdoc, review platform.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.
